violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the share refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria (C3), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the share refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

A crate of the principal's ice cream sandwiches was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Crate was placed on shelving during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
A leak was observed at the faucet of the hand wash sink in the dish wash area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Inspector observed metal rot at bottom corner of door and door frame preventing the new door sweep from fitting properly. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
